title: Criminal Procedure Act (Appointment of Finger Prints Experts) Notice, 2002
title_en: Criminal Procedure Act (Appointment of Finger Prints Experts) Notice, 2002

provisions.content: This Notice may be cited as the Criminal Procedure Act (Appoint­ment of Finger Prints Experts) Notice, 2002.

The Director of Public Prosecutions is hereby appointing the fol­lowing persons to be Finger Prints Experts: 1. Inspector Enna Robert Mbetwa. 2. A/Inspector Aman Mohamed Makanyaga. 3. A/Insp. Japhet Ezekiel Mabeyo 4. C.1434 D/Sgt. Renatus. 5. C. l820 D. Sgt. Elias Maziku. 6. C.4104 D. Cpi. Halphan Muhidin. 7. C.7283 D/Cpl. Frank Salum. 8. D.4043 D/Cpl. Epimack Theobald. 9. E.2916 D/C Peter Ngazafu.
